'''Drossk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] who worked for [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted alive by multiple entities for questioning in connection to Hutt accounting practices by the [[Senate Investigative Committee]]. He was also wanted dead by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] for causing considerable damage. He was killed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Drossk can be taken in dead or alive for the same price. It's up to the player to decide whether to take him in dead for Jabba or alive for the Senate Investigation Committee.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
